member.name: T:BIACore.BIACoreModule
member.summary: Another part of the BIACoreModule See also BIACoreModule.cs See also Log\BIACoreModule.cs In this section, we are concerned with 1) Handling security 2) Setting up c# user/session objects prior to application execution

Another part of the BIACoreModule See also BIACoreModule.cs See also Log\BIACoreModule.cs In this section, we are concerned with 1) Handling security 2) Setting up c# user/session objects prior to application execution
The core feature of BIACore.dll is the BIACoreModule.
member.remarks: This class is broken into chunks so that I can keep the appropriate parts in their respective areas. In this section, we are concerned with 1) application start - registering any controllers we may be providing 2) application init - ensuring we are run first if security is enabled. 3) manual routing - not sure this is necessary, but we can manually handle webapi routes if we're stuck in a non-webapi project.
member.summary: Another part of the BIACoreModule See also BIACoreModule.cs See also Log\BIACoreModule.cs In this section, we are concerned with 1) Handling security 2) Setting up c# user/session objects prior to application execution

member.name: M:BIACore.BIACoreModule.Activity(System.Object,System.EventArgs)
member.summary: We are called in the EndRequest event; here we decide whether or not to log the event.

member.name: M:BIACore.BIACoreModule.GetActivityData(System.Web.HttpRequest)
member.summary: Exposes the param build code externally for use with Enterprise Logging of Logins

member.name: M:BIACore.BIACoreModule.Error(System.Object,System.EventArgs)
member.summary: We are called before the client application's global.asax has an opportunity to handle the exception. Consequently, this will be recorded but may be handled and not shown to the client.

member.name: M:BIACore.BIACoreModule.EndRequest(System.Object,System.EventArgs)
member.summary: This happens at the beginning of the end of every request sent to the server. Consequently, it's a supremely heavy way to capture exceptions not handled by the client for logging. Not used atm, but kept around just in case.

member.name: F:BIACore.BIACoreModule.me
member.summary: Static reference to BIACoreModule object from startup

member.name: M:BIACore.BIACoreModule.onStart(System.Web.HttpApplication)
member.summary: Do startup activities

member.name: M:BIACore.BIACoreModule.Router(System.Object,System.EventArgs)
member.summary: Manually implement WebAPI routing for this specific request. Really only necessary in some (older) apps that aren't working very well. M.Erdmann This line is incorrect, used everywhere!

member.name: P:BIACore.Configuration.CoreElement.ServerInternal
member.Summary: ServerInternal represents the parent domain of the BIACore node, used to keep internal WebAPI calls running on the same node as the subdomain calls.

member.name: P:BIACore.Configuration.CoreElement.BIAEnvironment
member.summary: This variable is used by App Logging, Enterprise Logging, Header and internal BIA Core calls to determine which "Environment" it is running on, this is NOT the server/instance/subdomain

member.name: T:BIACore.Extensions.CollectionExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for all kind of Collections implementing the ICollection<T> interface

member.name: M:BIACore.Extensions.CollectionExtensions.AddUnique``1(System.Collections.Generic.ICollection{``0},``0)
member.summary: Adds a value uniquely to to a collection and returns a value whether the value was added or not.
member.returns: Indicates whether the value was added or not

example.code: list.AddUnique(1); // returns true; list.AddUnique(1); // returns false the second time;

member.name: M:BIACore.Extensions.CollectionExtensions.AddRangeUnique``1(System.Collections.Generic.ICollection{``0},System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{``0})
member.summary: Adds a range of value uniquely to a collection and returns the amount of values added.
member.returns: The amount if values that were added.

member.name: T:BIACore.Extensions.ComparableExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for all comparable objects eg. string, DateTime, numeric values ...

member.name: M:BIACore.Extensions.ComparableExtensions.IsBetween``1(``0,``0,``0)
member.summary: Determines whether the specified value is between the the defined minimum and maximum range (including those values).
member.returns: true if the specified value is between min and max; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:BIACore.Extensions.ComparableExtensions.IsBetween``1(``0,``0,``0,System.Collections.Generic.IComparer{``0})
member.summary: Determines whether the specified value is between the the defined minimum and maximum range (including those values).
member.param: An optional comparer to be used instead of the types default comparer.
member.returns: true if the specified value is between min and max; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:BIACore.Extensions.DataRowExtensions.ColumnValuesEqual(System.Data.DataRow,System.Object,System.Object)
member.summary: Compares two values to see if they are equal. Also compares DBNULL.Value. Note: If your DataTable contains object fields, then you must extend this function to handle them in a meaningful way if you intend to group on them.

member.name: M:BIACore.Extensions.DataRowExtensions.ToFile(System.Data.DataRow,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: This read the column as a byte[] and writes it straight to a file via BinaryWriter

member.name: M:BIACore.Extensions.DataRowExtensions.ToChar(System.Data.DataRow,System.String)
member.summary: Returns a character. NOTE: This will alway return at least ' ', NOT ''

member.name: M:BIACore.Extensions.DataRowExtensions.CopyTo(System.Data.DataRow,System.Data.DataRow)
member.summary: Copys any fields that exist in both rows. Does not copy primary key field(s). Does not write to readonly fields but will copy them to a destination if its not readonly.

member.name: M:BIACore.Extensions.DataTableExtensions.Locate(System.Data.DataTable,System.String,System.Object)
member.summary: Locate a key value in a column name This is a table walk. Only returns the first record found

member.name: M:BIACore.Extensions.DataTableExtensions.Remove(System.Data.DataTable,System.String)
member.summary: Non Destructive remove of rows found by 'filter'

member.name: M:BIACore.Extensions.DataTableExtensions.ToList``1(System.Data.DataTable,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Iterates over the rows of this DataTable and produces an anonymous object with named-properties based on the column names and values.

member.name: M:BIACore.Extensions.DateTimeExtensions.CalculateAge(System.DateTime)
member.summary: Calculates the age based on today.

member.name: M:BIACore.Extensions.DateTimeExtensions.CalculateAge(System.DateTime,System.DateTime)
member.summary: Calculates the age based on a passed reference date.
member.param: The reference date to calculate on.

member.name: M:BIACore.Extensions.DateTimeExtensions.GetCountDaysOfMonth(System.DateTime)
member.summary: Returns the number of days in the month of the provided date.

member.name: M:BIACore.Extensions.DateTimeExtensions.GetFirstDayOfMonth(System.DateTime)
member.summary: Returns the first day of the month of the provided date.
member.returns: The first day of the month

member.name: M:BIACore.Extensions.DateTimeExtensions.GetFirstDayOfMonth(System.DateTime,System.DayOfWeek)
member.summary: Returns the first day of the month of the provided date.
member.returns: The first day of the month

member.name: M:BIACore.Extensions.DateTimeExtensions.GetLastDayOfMonth(System.DateTime)
member.summary: Returns the last day of the month of the provided date.
member.returns: The last day of the month.

member.name: M:BIACore.Extensions.DateTimeExtensions.GetLastDayOfMonth(System.DateTime,System.DayOfWeek)
member.summary: Returns the last day of the month of the provided date.

member.name: M:BIACore.Extensions.DateTimeExtensions.IsToday(System.DateTime)
member.summary: Indicates whether the date is today.
member.returns: true if the specified date is today; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:BIACore.Extensions.DateTimeExtensions.SetTime(System.DateTime,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Sets the time on the specified DateTime value.
member.returns: The DateTime including the new time value

member.name: M:BIACore.Extensions.DateTimeExtensions.SetTime(System.DateTime,System.TimeSpan)
member.summary: Sets the time on the specified DateTime value.
member.returns: The DateTime including the new time value

member.name: M:BIACore.Extensions.DateTimeExtensions.ToDateTimeOffset(System.DateTime)
member.summary: Converts a DateTime into a DateTimeOffset using the local system time zone.

member.name: M:BIACore.Extensions.DateTimeExtensions.ToDateTimeOffset(System.DateTime,System.TimeZoneInfo)
member.summary: Converts a DateTime into a DateTimeOffset using the specified time zone.

member.name: M:BIACore.Extensions.DateTimeExtensions.GetFirstDayOfWeek(System.DateTime)
member.summary: Gets the first day of the week using the current culture.
member.returns: The first day of the week

member.name: M:BIACore.Extensions.DateTimeExtensions.GetFirstDayOfWeek(System.DateTime,System.Globalization.CultureInfo)
member.summary: Gets the first day of the week using the specified culture.
member.param: The culture to determine the first weekday of a week.
member.returns: The first day of the week

member.name: M:BIACore.Extensions.DateTimeExtensions.GetLastDayOfWeek(System.DateTime)
member.summary: Gets the last day of the week using the current culture.
member.returns: The first day of the week

member.name: M:BIACore.Extensions.DateTimeExtensions.GetLastDayOfWeek(System.DateTime,System.Globalization.CultureInfo)
member.summary: Gets the last day of the week using the specified culture.
member.param: The culture to determine the first weekday of a week.
member.returns: The first day of the week

member.name: M:BIACore.Extensions.DateTimeExtensions.GetWeeksWeekday(System.DateTime,System.DayOfWeek)
member.summary: Gets the next occurence of the specified weekday within the current week using the current culture.

member.name: M:BIACore.Extensions.DateTimeExtensions.GetWeeksWeekday(System.DateTime,System.DayOfWeek,System.Globalization.CultureInfo)
member.summary: Gets the next occurence of the specified weekday within the current week using the specified culture.
member.param: The culture to determine the first weekday of a week.

member.name: M:BIACore.Extensions.DateTimeExtensions.GetNextWeekday(System.DateTime,System.DayOfWeek)
member.summary: Gets the next occurence of the specified weekday.

member.name: M:BIACore.Extensions.DateTimeExtensions.GetPreviousWeekday(System.DateTime,System.DayOfWeek)
member.summary: Gets the previous occurence of the specified weekday.

member.name: T:BIACore.Extensions.ListExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for all kind of Lists implementing the IList<T> interface

member.name: M:BIACore.Extensions.ListExtensions.InsertUnique``1(System.Collections.Generic.IList{``0},System.Int32,``0)
member.summary: Inserts an item uniquely to to a list and returns a value whether the item was inserted or not.
member.param: The list to be inserted into.
The index to insert the item at.
member.returns: Indicates whether the item was inserted or not

member.name: M:BIACore.Extensions.ListExtensions.InsertRangeUnique``1(System.Collections.Generic.IList{``0},System.Int32,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{``0})
member.summary: Inserts a range of items uniquely to a list starting at a given index and returns the amount of items inserted.
member.param: The list to be inserted into.
member.returns: The amount if items that were inserted.

member.name: M:BIACore.Extensions.ListExtensions.IndexOf``1(System.Collections.Generic.IList{``0},System.Func{``0,System.Boolean})
member.summary: Return the index of the first matching item or -1.

member.name: M:BIACore.Extensions.StringExtensions.IsValidUrl(System.String)
member.summary:
Checks if url is valid. from http://www.osix.net/modules/article/?id=586 and changed to match http://localhost
complete (not only http) url regex can be found at http://internet.ls-la.net/folklore/url-regexpr.html

member.name: M:BIACore.Extensions.StringExtensions.RemoveSpaces(System.String)
member.summary: remove white space, not line end Useful when parsing user input such phone, price int.Parse("1 000 000".RemoveSpaces(),.....

member.name: M:BIACore.Extensions.StringExtensions.IsNumber(System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: true, if the string can be parse as Double respective Int32 Spaces are not considred.
member.param: true, if Double is considered, otherwhise Int32 is considered.
member.returns: true, if the string contains only digits or float-point

member.name: M:BIACore.Extensions.StringExtensions.IsNumberOnly(System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: true, if the string contains only digits or float-point. Spaces are not considred.
member.returns: true, if the string contains only digits or float-point

member.name: M:BIACore.Extensions.StringExtensions.RemoveDiacritics(System.String)
member.summary: Remove accent from strings
member.example: input: "Příliš žluťoučký kůň úpěl ďábelské ódy." result: "Prilis zlutoucky kun upel dabelske ody."

member.name: M:BIACore.Extensions.StringExtensions.Nl2Br(System.String)
member.summary:
Replace \r\n or \n by
from http://weblogs.asp.net/gunnarpeipman/archive/2007/11/18/c-extension-methods.aspx

member.name: M:BIACore.Extensions.StringExtensions.Br2NL(System.String)
member.summary:
Replace
with \r\n

member.name: M:BIACore.Extensions.StringExtensions.IsEmpty(System.String)
member.summary: Determines whether the specified string is null or empty.

member.name: M:BIACore.Extensions.StringExtensions.IsNotEmpty(System.String)
member.summary: Determines whether the specified string is not null or empty.

member.name: M:BIACore.Extensions.StringExtensions.IfEmpty(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Checks whether the string is empty and returns a default value in case.
member.returns: Either the string or the default value.

member.name: M:BIACore.Extensions.StringExtensions.FormatWith(System.String,System.Object[])
member.summary: Formats the value with the parameters using string.Format.

member.name: M:BIACore.Extensions.StringExtensions.TrimToMaxLength(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Trims the text to a provided maximum length.

member.name: M:BIACore.Extensions.StringExtensions.TrimToMaxLength(System.String,System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Trims the text to a provided maximum length and adds a suffix if required.

member.name: M:BIACore.Extensions.StringExtensions.Contains(System.String,System.String,System.StringComparison)
member.summary: Determines whether the comparison value strig is contained within the input value string
member.param: Type of the comparison to allow case sensitive or insensitive comparison.
member.returns: true if input value contains the specified value, otherwise, false.

member.name: M:BIACore.Extensions.StringExtensions.ToXDocument(System.String)
member.summary: Loads the string into a LINQ to XML XDocument

member.name: M:BIACore.Extensions.StringExtensions.ToXmlDOM(System.String)
member.summary: Loads the string into a XML DOM object (XmlDocument)

member.name: M:BIACore.Extensions.StringExtensions.ToXPath(System.String)
member.summary: Loads the string into a XML XPath DOM (XPathDocument)
member.returns: The XML XPath document object model (XPathNavigator)

member.name: M:BIACore.Extensions.StringExtensions.Reverse(System.String)
member.summary: Reverses / mirrors a string.

member.name: M:BIACore.Extensions.StringExtensions.EnsureStartsWith(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Ensures that a string starts with a given prefix.
member.param: The prefix value to check for.
member.returns: The string value including the prefix

example.code: var extension = "txt"; var fileName = string.Concat(file.Name, extension.EnsureStartsWith("."));

member.name: M:BIACore.Extensions.StringExtensions.EnsureEndsWith(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Ensures that a string ends with a given suffix.
member.param: The suffix value to check for.
member.returns: The string value including the suffix

member.name: M:BIACore.Extensions.StringExtensions.IsMatchingTo(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Uses regular expressions to determine if the string matches to a given regex pattern.
member.returns: true if the value is matching to the specified pattern; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:BIACore.Extensions.StringExtensions.IsMatchingTo(System.String,System.String,System.Text.RegularExpressions.RegexOptions)
member.summary: Uses regular expressions to determine if the string matches to a given regex pattern.
member.returns: true if the value is matching to the specified pattern; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:BIACore.Extensions.StringExtensions.ReplaceWith(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Uses regular expressions to replace parts of a string.

example.code: var s = "12345"; var replaced = s.ReplaceWith(@"\d", m => string.Concat(" -", m.Value, "- "));

member.name: M:BIACore.Extensions.StringExtensions.ReplaceWith(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Text.RegularExpressions.RegexOptions)
member.summary: Uses regular expressions to replace parts of a string.

example.code: var s = "12345"; var replaced = s.ReplaceWith(@"\d", m => string.Concat(" -", m.Value, "- "));

member.name: M:BIACore.Extensions.StringExtensions.ReplaceWith(System.String,System.String,System.Text.RegularExpressions.MatchEvaluator)
member.summary: Uses regular expressions to replace parts of a string.

example.code: var s = "12345"; var replaced = s.ReplaceWith(@"\d", m => string.Concat(" -", m.Value, "- "));

member.name: M:BIACore.Extensions.StringExtensions.ReplaceWith(System.String,System.String,System.Text.RegularExpressions.RegexOptions,System.Text.RegularExpressions.MatchEvaluator)
member.summary: Uses regular expressions to replace parts of a string.

example.code: var s = "12345"; var replaced = s.ReplaceWith(@"\d", m => string.Concat(" -", m.Value, "- "));

member.summary: Uses regular expressions to determine all matches of a given regex pattern.

member.name: M:BIACore.Extensions.StringExtensions.GetMatches(System.String,System.String,System.Text.RegularExpressions.RegexOptions)
member.summary: Uses regular expressions to determine all matches of a given regex pattern.

member.name: M:BIACore.Extensions.StringExtensions.GetMatchingValues(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Uses regular expressions to determine all matches of a given regex pattern and returns them as string enumeration.

member.name: M:BIACore.Extensions.StringExtensions.GetMatchingValues(System.String,System.String,System.Text.RegularExpressions.RegexOptions)
member.summary: Uses regular expressions to determine all matches of a given regex pattern and returns them as string enumeration.

member.name: M:BIACore.Extensions.StringExtensions.Split(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Uses regular expressions to split a string into parts.

member.name: M:BIACore.Extensions.StringExtensions.Split(System.String,System.String,System.Text.RegularExpressions.RegexOptions)
member.summary: Uses regular expressions to split a string into parts.

member.name: M:BIACore.Extensions.StringExtensions.GetWords(System.String)
member.summary: Splits the given string into words and returns a string array.

member.name: M:BIACore.Extensions.StringExtensions.GetWordByIndex(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets the nth "word" of a given string, where "words" are substrings separated by a given separator
member.param: The string from which the word should be retrieved.
member.returns: The word at position n of the string. Trying to retrieve a word at a position lower than 0 or at a position where no word exists results in an exception.

member.name: M:BIACore.Extensions.StringExtensions.ToBytes(System.String)
member.summary: Converts the string to a byte-array using the default encoding

member.name: M:BIACore.Extensions.StringExtensions.ToBytes(System.String,System.Text.Encoding)
member.summary: Converts the string to a byte-array using the supplied encoding

member.name: M:BIACore.Extensions.StringExtensions.EncodeBase64(System.String)
member.summary: Encodes the input value to a Base64 string using the default encoding.

member.name: M:BIACore.Extensions.StringExtensions.EncodeBase64(System.String,System.Text.Encoding)
member.summary: Encodes the input value to a Base64 string using the supplied encoding.

member.name: M:BIACore.Extensions.StringExtensions.DecodeBase64(System.String)
member.summary: Decodes a Base 64 encoded value to a string using the default encoding.

member.name: M:BIACore.Extensions.StringExtensions.DecodeBase64(System.String,System.Text.Encoding)
member.summary: Decodes a Base 64 encoded value to a string using the supplied encoding.

member.name: T:BIACore.Extensions.TextReaderExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for the TextReader class and its sub classes (StreamReader, StringReader)

member.name: M:BIACore.Extensions.TextReaderExtensions.IterateLines(System.IO.TextReader)
member.summary: The method provides an iterator through all lines of the text reader.

member.name: M:BIACore.Extensions.TextReaderExtensions.IterateLines(System.IO.TextReader,System.Action{System.String})
member.summary: The method executes the passed delegate /lambda expression) for all lines of the text reader.

member.name: T:BIACore.Internal._AsyncOp
member.summary: This section is for saving the log entries to the database outside of the operating context. It acts as a local speed-up; these will end up getting queue'd and then fired all at once at the end of whatever operation is in progress.

member.name: T:BIACore.Model.ConfigResponse
member.summary: Represents the schema of the table EnvServerNodeAppLog.

member.name: T:BIACore.Model.EnvServerNodeAppLog
member.summary: Represents the schema of the table EnvServerNodeAppLog.

member.summary: Gets or sets the EnvServerNodeId element contained for EnvServerNodeAppLog.

member.summary: Gets or sets the Environment element contained for EnvServerNodeAppLog.

member.summary: Gets or sets the Website element contained for EnvServerNodeAppLog.

member.name: P:BIACore.Model.EnvServerNodeAppLog.Domain
member.summary: Gets or sets the Node element contained for EnvServerNodeAppLog.

member.name: P:BIACore.Model.EnvServerNodeAppLog.appCode
member.summary: Gets or sets the Domain element contained for EnvServerNodeAppLog.

member.name: P:BIACore.Model.EnvServerNodeAppLog.ReturnPath
member.summary: Gets or sets the AppCode element contained for EnvServerNodeAppLog.

member.name: P:BIACore.Model.UserApp.multiple
member.summary: Indicates this user has multiple Application permissions.

member.name: P:BIACore.Model.UserBase.userId
member.summary: The user's unique identifier (sysm currently, but may change).

member.name: P:BIACore.Model.UserBase.adId
member.summary: The user's Windows login id.

member.name: P:BIACore.Model.UserBase.employeeId
member.summary: The user's employee id - only valid for employees.

member.name: P:BIACore.Model.UserBase.firstName
member.summary: The user's given name.

member.name: P:BIACore.Model.UserBase.lastName
member.summary: The user's family name.

member.name: P:BIACore.Model.UserBase.email
member.summary: The user's email address.

member.name: P:BIACore.Model.UserBase.phone
member.summary: The user's phone number, if available.

member.name: P:BIACore.Model.UserBase.department
member.summary: The department the user reports to.

member.name: M:BIACore.Model.Permission.ToObject``1
member.summary: Newtonsoft.JSON provides this method automatically. When using this class locally, the method still needs to exist for Rules.User() calls.

member.name: T:BIACore.Provider.Oracle
member.summary: Provider for interop'ing with Oracle. Tracks performance of queries, logs exceptions, etc...

member.name: M:BIACore.Provider.Oracle.Execute``1(System.String,System.String,BIACore.Model.DBParameter[])
member.summary: Performs an Oracle Execute for the given connection, stored procedure, args list. Automatically casts the result from a datatable into a list of fully typed objects.
member.param: Any arguments to pass to the stored procedure
member.returns: List<T> the list of type objects or an empty list.

member.name: M:BIACore.Provider.Oracle.Execute``1(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Perform an Oracle Execute for a given connection and raw oracle text. Automatically casts the result from a datatable into a list of fully typed objects.
member.returns: List<T> the list of type objects or an empty list.

member.name: T:BIACore.Provider.SQL
member.summary: Provider for interop'ing with SQL. Tracks performance of queries, logs exceptions, etc...

member.name: M:BIACore.Provider.SQL.Execute``1(System.String,System.String,BIACore.Model.DBParameter[])
member.summary: Performs an SQL Execute for the given connection, stored procedure, args list. Automatically casts the result from a datatable into a list of fully typed objects.
member.param: Any arguments to pass to the stored procedure
member.returns: List<T> the list of type objects or an empty list.

member.name: M:BIACore.Provider.SQL.Execute``1(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Perform an SQL Execute for a given connection and raw sql text. Automatically casts the result from a datatable into a list of fully typed objects.
member.returns: List<T> the list of type objects or an empty list.

member.name: T:BIACore.Reflection.Reflector
member.summary:
This class does the dynamic class generation for the Providers. (see GetTypeBuilder)
If you pass in a type T - do make sure it is public, otherwise the assembly won't be able to extend it.

member.name: T:BIACore.Security.Application
member.summary: This static class is for accessing the current User object. Internally, it contains an Obj property which is a reference to the current user object; if none exists, nulls will (usually) be returned. There are 2 modes of operation; inside of a web application, this will automatically be provided assuming you're using the BIA security system. If you're in a standalone mode (e.g. running as a window service) you can manually set the User by calling User.StandAlone(UserId) - the appropriate user (and their permissions) will be loaded automatically.

member.name: T:BIACore.Security.Session
member.summary: This static class is for accessing the current Session object. Internally, it contains an Obj property which is a reference to the current session object; if none exists, nulls will (usually) be returned. As a client, you shouldn't worry about this; also it doesn't exist in standalone mode.

member.name: P:BIACore.Security.Session.pollInterval
member.summary: How long this Session can be considered "valid" for

member.name: P:BIACore.Security.Session.sessionId
member.summary: The UserId associated with this Session

member.name: P:BIACore.Security.Session.ad_id
member.summary: The UserId associated with this Session

member.name: P:BIACore.Security.Session.empId
member.summary: The UserId associated with this Session

member.name: P:BIACore.Security.Session.userId
member.summary: The UserId associated with this Session

member.name: P:BIACore.Security.Session.authenticatedId
member.summary: The UserId associated with this Session

member.name: P:BIACore.Security.Session.authenticated_ad_id
member.summary: The UserId associated with this Session

member.name: P:BIACore.Security.Session.appCode
member.summary: The UserId associated with this Session

member.name: P:BIACore.Security.Session.appOnline
member.summary: The UserId associated with this Session

member.name: P:BIACore.Security.Session.status
member.summary: The UserId associated with this Session

member.name: P:BIACore.Security.Session.msg
member.summary: The UserId associated with this Session

member.name: M:BIACore.Security.Session.IsCachable(BIACore.Model.Session)
member.summary: Determines if the session object is available for Http caching

member.name: M:BIACore.Security.Session.LogSessionStatus(BIACore.Model.Session)
member.summary: Logs session if detail is a loggable event

member.name: T:BIACore.Security.User
member.summary: This static class is for accessing the current User object. Internally, it contains an Obj property which is a reference to the current user object; if none exists, nulls will (usually) be returned. There are 2 modes of operation; inside of a web application, this will automatically be provided assuming you're using the BIA security system. If you're in a standalone mode (e.g. running as a window service) you can manually set the User by calling User.StandAlone(UserId) - the appropriate user (and their permissions) will be loaded automatically.

member.name: P:BIACore.Security.User.UserId
member.summary: The userId for the current user.

member.name: P:BIACore.Security.User.authenticatedId
member.summary: The authenticated user's id (can be different from current user thanks to superimpose)

member.name: P:BIACore.Security.User.authenticatedFirstName
member.summary: The authenticated user's first name (can be different from current user thanks to superimpose)

member.name: P:BIACore.Security.User.authenticatedLastName
member.summary: The authenticated user's last name (can be different from current user thanks to superimpose)

member.name: P:BIACore.Security.User.isCorporate
member.summary: returns true if the user is considered "corporate"

member.name: P:BIACore.Security.User.isSA
member.summary: Returns true if the current user is considered at least an application Super Admin

member.name: P:BIACore.Security.User.isAdmin
member.summary: Returns true if the current user is considered at least an application Admin

member.name: M:BIACore.Security.User.logout
member.summary: Manually log out the current user.

member.name: M:BIACore.Security.User.impersonateUser(System.String)
member.summary: Pretend to be a different user in the current application.
member.param: userId of the target to pretend to be

member.name: M:BIACore.Security.User.StandAlone(System.String)
member.summary: Meant for use in non Http-Environment apps, e.g. Windows Services

member.name: M:BIACore.Security.User.Lookup(System.String)
member.summary: Look up the given user by the provided UserId. Requires at least application Admin permissions; if the current user is not, an exception will be thrown.
member.returns: Null if no user is found, or the given user

member.summary: The basis for BIACoreModule. Handles determining the difference between application startup and request startup.

member.summary: ASPx control for adding a server-invariant <link> html item.

member.summary: Base class for dynamically hosted ASPx controls.

member.name: P:BIACore.Web.Controls.Resource.Path
member.summary: The path to the compressed/minified file for this resource.

member.name: P:BIACore.Web.Controls.Resource.DebugPath
member.summary: The path to the uncompressed (debug) file for this resource.

member.name: P:BIACore.Web.Controls.Resource.AlwaysCache
member.summary: When true this resource will always be cached regardless of webconfig.core.debug configuration.

member.name: T:BIACore.Web.Controls.Script
member.summary: ASPx control for adding a server-invariant <script> html item.

member.name: T:BIACore.Web.Controls.SimpleControl
member.summary: Base class for dynamically hosted ASPx controls.

member.name: M:BIACore.Web.Optimization.Links.Render(System.String,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Embeds an html link resource in the webpage. Also replaces some "magic" strings with values determined at run time. {server} is replaced with the BIACore config "server" string. {baseurl} is replaced with the BIACore config "baseurl" string.
member.param: Required - this is the default URI to use.
Optional - this is the URI to use when in debug mode. If not specified, uses "path".
Optional - adds a query string parameter (_dc=ticks) to prevent caching of this resource.

member.name: M:BIACore.Web.Optimization.Scripts.Render(System.String,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Embeds an html link resource in the webpage. Also replaces some "magic" strings with values determined at run time. {server} is replaced with the BIACore config "server" string. {baseurl} is replaced with the BIACore config "baseurl" string.
member.param: Required - this is the default URI to use.
Optional - this is the URI to use when in debug mode. If not specified, uses "path".
Optional - adds a query string parameter (_dc=ticks) to prevent caching of this resource.
